Pursuant to Article 23 of Visa Code, visa applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days of the date of the
lodging of an application which is admissible in accordance with Article 19. That period may be extended up to a
maximum of 45 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
A tourist visa allows you to stay in the Schengen area for a short period
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for issuing the visa will be:
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- The Embassy of the country of first entry, if the traveler is to stay in different Schengen countries for the same amount of time.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
Special provisions for family members of EU Citizens (https://keliauk.urm.lt/en/entry-to-lithuania/visas/family-members-of-an-eu-citizen-or-a-citizen-of-an-efta-member-state)
Information of Prior Consultation (https://keliauk.urm.lt/en/entry-to-lithuania/visas/prior-consultations)
Important notice
As part of the visa application process, you may be invited to attend an interview at the Lithuanian Embassy in Abu Dhabi. 
If you receive an invitation for an interview, please be aware that your personal presence is mandatory. 
The Embassy will email you with specific details regarding the date and time of the interview.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A tourist visa allows you to stay in the Schengen area for a short period
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for issuing the visa will be:
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- The Embassy of the country of first entry, if the traveler is to stay in different Schengen countries for the same amount of time.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
Special provisions for family members of EU Citizens (https://keliauk.urm.lt/en/entry-to-lithuania/visas/family-members-of-an-eu-citizen-or-a-citizen-of-an-efta-member-state)
Information of Prior Consultation (https://keliauk.urm.lt/en/entry-to-lithuania/visas/prior-consultations)
Important notice
As part of the visa application process, you may be invited to attend an interview at the Lithuanian Embassy in Abu Dhabi. 
If you receive an invitation for an interview, please be aware that your personal presence is mandatory. 
The Embassy will email you with specific details regarding the date and time of the interview.

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Tourist Visit]
Please note:
- Please be informed that the fees charged by the Embassy or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification.
- Applicant shall be charged a service charge of AED 68.61 per application in addition to the visa fees.
- No service charges will be levied for children below 12 years old.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3rBprb1nNx1Ou5zTvio4Lc/bc50c862a319cd6db3620efd5640313b/Lithuania-Checklist-Short-stay-updated-04.04.2025.pdf) for the list of documents required.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants are requested to submit their application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
General
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Portrait-style picture ( no slopping or posing), showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
- The picture dimensions must be at least 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not
                                                                            valid.
- The photo should keep a proportion of 3 x 4 (width x height) within limits. (i.e. 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one).
- The image quality (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi. When you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Group Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected.
Attaching the Photo to the Application form
- Glue one photograph to the application form in the designated space.
Note: If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, a separate application has to be submitted for
                                                                        each child.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph provided does not meet these requirements, your application will be considered incomplete. 

## Processing Time
Pursuant to Article 23 of Visa Code, visa applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days of the date of the
lodging of an application which is admissible in accordance with Article 19. That period may be extended up to a
maximum of 45 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.

## Online Application Form
To fill your application form kindly click here (https://www.migracija.lt/app/auth/login)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa allows a short stay, to people travelling for business purposes, such as business meetings/deals, conferences and events.
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for issuing the visa will be:
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- The Embassy of the country of first entry if the traveler is to stay the same amount of time in different Schengen countries.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
Special provisions for family members of EU Citizens (https://keliauk.urm.lt/en/entry-to-lithuania/visas/family-members-of-an-eu-citizen-or-a-citizen-of-an-efta-member-state)
Information of Prior Consultation (https://keliauk.urm.lt/en/entry-to-lithuania/visas/prior-consultations)
Important notice
As part of the visa application process, you may be invited to attend an interview at the Lithuanian Embassy in Abu Dhabi. 
If you receive an invitation for an interview, please be aware that your personal presence is mandatory. 
The Embassy will email you with specific details regarding the date and time of the interview.

Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for issuing the visa will be:

Note: If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, a separate application has to be submitted for
                                                                        each child.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph provided does not meet these requirements, your application will be considered incomplete. 

## Processing Time
Pursuant to Article 23 of Visa Code, visa applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days of the date of the
lodging of an application which is admissible in accordance with Article 19. That period may be extended up to a
maximum of 45 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.

## Online Application Form
To fill your application form kindly click here (https://www.migracija.lt/app/auth/login)

visa_types.name: Short Term Visa C
visa_types.overview:
Schengen visa must be obtained from the Embassy/Consulate of the country where the main purpose of travel lies. Therefore, please check your travel plans before submitting your application. In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please make your application to the one where you will be staying for the maximum number of days. If the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country during the first trip, you must submit your visa application at the Embassy/Consulate of your first point of entry.
Please book appointments well in advance depending on your intended date of travel to avoid any inconvenience. Applications cannot be submitted earlier than six (6) months before the travel date. Please refer to the processing time specific to this Mission. 
- Business Visit
- Cultural, Scientific or Sport Activities
- Friends and Family Visit
- Tourist Visit
visa_types.full_text:
Schengen visa must be obtained from the Embassy/Consulate of the country where the main purpose of travel lies. Therefore, please check your travel plans before submitting your application. In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please make your application to the one where you will be staying for the maximum number of days. If the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country during the first trip, you must submit your visa application at the Embassy/Consulate of your first point of entry.
Please book appointments well in advance depending on your intended date of travel to avoid any inconvenience. Applications cannot be submitted earlier than six (6) months before the travel date. Please refer to the processing time specific to this Mission. 
- Business Visit
- Cultural, Scientific or Sport Activities
- Friends and Family Visit
- Tourist Visit

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A person who arrives to the Republic of Lithuania to establish a company and permit issued to the alien by the Employment Service under the Ministry of Social Security and Labour of the
                                                                        Republic of Lithuania.
A completed and signed application form for National visa. An application is to be completed online at https://visa.vrm.lt/epm (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A person who arrives to the Republic of Lithuania to establish a company and permit issued to the alien by the Employment Service under the Ministry of Social Security and Labour of the
                                                                        Republic of Lithuania.
A completed and signed application form for National visa. An application is to be completed online at https://visa.vrm.lt/epm (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm)

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Company Founder/Shareholder Visa]
Please note:
- Please be informed that the fees charged by the Embassy or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification.
- Applicant shall be charged a service charge of AED 76.43 per application in addition to the visa fees. 
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/rbFmWaRtTBkKlgk1rpgKG/9848670a0b3567c547bb402ef61cc775/company-founder-shareholder-visa-checklist.pdf) for the list of documents required.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants are requested to submit their application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
General
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Portrait-style picture ( no slopping or posing), showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
- The picture dimensions must be at least 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not
                                                                            valid.
- The photo should keep a proportion of 3 x 4 (width x height) within limits. (i.e. 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one).
- The image quality (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi. When you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Group Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected.
Attaching the Photo to the Application form
- Glue one photograph to the application form in the designated space.
Note: If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, a separate application has to be submitted for
                                                                        each child.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph provided does not meet these requirements, your application will be considered incomplete. 

## Processing Time
The processing time for applications is minimum 15 working days, as per the Schengen Regulation, In exceptional cases, this period may be extended up to 30 calendar days, notably when
                                                                        further scrutiny of the application is needed and when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 calendar days.
Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.

## Online Application Form
To fill your application form kindly click here (https://www.migracija.lt/app/auth/login)

Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for the issuing of the visa will be:
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- The Embassy of the country of first entry if the traveler is to stay the same amount of time in different Schengen countries.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
Special provisions for family members of EU Citizens (https://keliauk.urm.lt/en/entry-to-lithuania/visas/family-members-of-an-eu-citizen-or-a-citizen-of-an-efta-member-state)
Information of Prior Consultation (https://keliauk.urm.lt/en/entry-to-lithuania/visas/prior-consultations)
Important notice
As part of the visa application process, you may be invited to attend an interview at the Lithuanian Embassy in Abu Dhabi. 
If you receive an invitation for an interview, please be aware that your personal presence is mandatory. 
The Embassy will email you with specific details regarding the date and time of the interview.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants are requested to submit their application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
General
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Portrait-style picture ( no slopping or posing), showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
- The picture dimensions must be at least 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not
                                                                            valid.
- The photo should keep a proportion of 3 x 4 (width x height) within limits. (i.e. 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels one).
- The image quality (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi. When you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Group Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected.
Attaching the Photo to the Application form
- Glue one photograph to the application form in the designated space.
Note: If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, a separate application has to be submitted for
                                                                        each child.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph provided does not meet these requirements, your application will be considered incomplete. 

## Processing Time
Pursuant to Article 23 of Visa Code, visa applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days of the date of the
lodging of an application which is admissible in accordance with Article 19. That period may be extended up to a
maximum of 45 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
